PETROLEUM AND NATURAL GAS REGULATORY BOARD NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 23rd March, 2018 F, No. S-Admn/II/X1/2012—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 61 of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board Act, 2006 (Act 19 of 2006), the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board hereby makes the following regulations, namely: — 1. Short title and commencement: - (1) These regulations may be called the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Appointment of Consultants) Amendment Regulations, 2018. -- 2 of 3 -- (am Ul—wars 4] FRG HT UTA : STIR 3 (2) These regulations shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Appointment of Consultants) Regulations, 2007, - (a) in regulation 17, in sub-regulation (6), - (i) in clause (a), the following proviso shall be added, namely: - “Provided that the Board in its discretion may extend the period for engagement of an individual consultant beyond three years”; (ii) in clause (c), in sub-clause (ii), for the year “2012”, the year “2018” shall be substituted; (ii) in clause (j), after the words “obtain approval of”, for the word “Board”, the word “Chairperson” shall be substituted; (b) for Schedule III, the following shall be substituted, namely: - “SCHEDULE II Vevelor Tonividual Lump sum monthly remuneration Consultant I & 50,000 with 10 per-cent increase on completion of each year II = 75,000 with 10 per-cent increase on completion of cach year, Hl R 1,00,000 with 10 per-cent increase on completion of each year. Iv & 1,10,000 with 10 per-cent increase on completion of each year. Vv & 1,30,000 with 10 per-cent increase on completion of each year. VANDANA SHARMA, Secy. [ADVT.IIV/4/Exty./488/17] Foot Note: Principal regulations were notificd vide No. G.S.R.36(E) dated 30th November 2007 and subsequently amended vide notification [F.No.S-Admn/II/XI/2012] dated 10.04.2012.
